body.Subject: DEVICE ISOLATION FAILED - Action Required - Security AutoContain
body.Body:
Security AutoContain attempted to isolate the device but was unable to confirm success.
Microsoft Security Controls have determined the following device is at-risk or already compromised.


Analyst Actions Needed:
Review the referenced Incident / Alert
Complete remediation
Notify relevant SOC Group of recovery requirements
Update/Close Incident in Defender


Device Name:
@{variables('DeviceName')}

Reason:
@{outputs('Compose_Incident_URL')}


Trigger:
@{outputs('Summary_Agent')?['lastAssistantMessage']}

inputs.name: BODY
inputs.value: This is a message from Security-Auto-Isolation. Isolation is currently disabled, the test machine has been isolated as a test. fix that in the Logic App Parameters. Thank you.

inputs.name: BODY
inputs.value:
Microsoft Security Controls have determined the following Server is at-risk or already compromised.

Analyst Actions Needed:
Review the referenced Incident / Alert
Complete remediation
Notify relevant SOC Group (if needed)
Update/Close Incident in Defender

inputs.name: SUBJECT
inputs.value: Server Has Been Isolated by Security AutoContain

inputs.name: BODY
inputs.value:
SERVER ISOLATED
Microsoft Security Controls have determined the following Server is at-risk or already compromised.

Analyst Actions Needed:
Review the referenced Incident / Alert
Complete remediation
Notify relevant SOC Group of recovery requirements
Update/Close Incident in Defender

inputs.name: SUBJECT
inputs.value: Workstation Has Been Isolated by Security AutoContain

inputs.name: BODY
inputs.value:
WORKSTATION ISOLATED
Microsoft Security Controls have determined the following device is at-risk or already compromised.

Analyst Actions Needed:
Review the referenced Incident / Alert
Complete remediation
Notify relevant SOC Group of recovery requirements
Update/Close Incident in Defender

messages.content:
A device, or multiple devices have just been isolated. 

You have been given the list of devices that were isolated and a list of triggered alerts that caused the isolation of that device. Note, that because this processes has taken place, it means that it was determined that automatic remediation missed or did not "prevent" or "block" a process. So please summarize from the point of view of before isolation. Don't even mention the isolation that the current process took. You are writing a summary of why you isolated, so the fact that you took action or isolated is irrelevant. No bold or formatting allowed. You need to write a summary of that alert in only 1-2 lines. Do not return any conversational details, only return the 1-2 line summary. Please also include before the 1-2 line summary the name of the device for example:

DEVICENAME.domain.com: XXXX 

### Device Names:
@{union(variables('ActiveEntities'), variables('ActiveEntities'))}

### Alerts:
@{outputs('Compose_Alerts')}
